ai_said: Wear Yellow Sapphire (Pukhraj) for Jupiter to strengthen 9th house
pandit_said: Pukhraj is not suitable. For Simha lagna, Jupiter owns 5th (benefic) but also 8th (malefic). In this chart Jupiter is debilitated in Makara. Wearing Pukhraj will activate 8th house problems — hidden expenses, accidents. Instead, recommend Ruby (Manikya) for Sun, the lagna lord.
pandit_reasoning: Jupiter is a mixed lord for Simha lagna (5th+8th). When debilitated, the malefic 8th house significations dominate. Lagna lord Sun in good dignity is always the safest recommendation.
